name: ai-vendor-risk-review-kit
description: Procurement-grade technical risk reviews for companies adopting AI tools.

scripts.lint: node --check lib/load-review.mjs && node --check lib/render-sections.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-report.mjs && node --check scripts/validate-samples.mjs && node --check test/generator.test.mjs
scripts.check:reports: npm run generate && git diff --exit-code reports/
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run validate && npm test && npm run check:reports
